top_findings.title: Archived workspace contains no source, tests, or README — deliverables absent
top_findings.evidence: find rep2/ -type f returns only TASK.md, stack.json, scores.json, _meta.json, _agent_stdout.log, _agent_stderr.log, .coverage, .hermes_usage.json — no app.py/test_app.py/README.md, though _agent_stdout.log claims all three were created. Sibling rep1 (same cell) archived all source. TASK.md deliverable 'Working source code in the workspace directory' is not present in the archive.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix the runner's archive step so generated source is copied into run_dir; re-run or re-archive this cell. Conformance (R1–R11) cannot be verified until source is restored.
